recalls.Description:
Tempo USA is recalling all Ambiano electric pressure cookers identified by model numbers 93550 (KY-318B), 96775 (KY-318A), and 98527 (6L-PC). These cookers are available in six-quart and eight-quart capacities, with the Ambiano brand name displayed on the front and the model number located on the bottom label of each unit. Consumers should be aware of the serious burn hazards associated with these products.

The risk arises from the possibility of the pressure-cooker lid being opened prematurely, before adequate steam pressure is released, leading to the escape of hot contents and potential burn injuries. It is crucial for consumers to take immediate action regarding this recall to ensure their safety.
recalls.Title: Tempo USA Recalls Ambiano Electric Pressure Cookers Due to Burn Risks; Injuries Reported
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach ALDI at 800-325-7894 from 9 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, visit https://help.aldi.us/contact-form-product, or email Tempo at serviceusa@tempo.org. More information is also available on the ALDI website under the "Product Recalls" section.

Images.Caption: Recalled Pressure Cooker, Model Number 93550 (KY-318B) Rating Label
Recalled Pressure Cooker, Model Number 96775 (KY-318A) Rating Label
Recalled Pressure Cooker, Model Number 98527 (6L-PC) Rating Label

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 11 reports of incidents, in which the contents were expelled under pressure, including eight reports of severe burn injuries.

Retailers.Name: Available at ALDI stores nationwide from January 2016 to December 2019 for approximately $40.

Importers.Name: Tempo International (USA) Inc., of Aventura, Florida

Hazards.Name: Risk of burns from premature lid opening

Remedies.Name: Stop using the pressure cookers and contact Tempo or ALDI for a refund. Return the cooker to any ALDI store for a full refund or email Tempo with a photo of the unplugged cooker and model details.

recalls.metaDescription: Tempo USA recalls Ambiano electric pressure cookers due to burn hazards. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description: SharkNinja is recalling all Ninja Foodi OP300 Series Multi-Function Pressure Cookers due to a serious burn hazard. These cookers, featuring pressure cooking and air frying capabilities, come in black and have a 6.5-quart capacity. Each unit displays 'Ninja' on the front and includes model numbers OP300, OP301, OP301A, OP302, OP302BRN, OP302HCN, OP302HAQ, OP302HW, OP302HB, OP305, OP305CO, and OP350CO on a side label. Replacement lids for these models are also included in the recall.
recalls.Title: SharkNinja Recalls 1.8 Million Foodi Multi-Function Pressure Cookers Due to Burn Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach SharkNinja at 888-370-1733 from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, and 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET Saturday. Alternatively, email sharkninja@rqa-inc.com or visit https://www.rqa-inc.com/client/SharkNinja/ or www.ninjakitchen.com and navigate to 'Recalls' under 'Support'.

Products.Name: Ninja Foodi OP300 Series Multi-Function Pressure Cookers
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 1,846,400 (In addition, about 184,240 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled SharkNinja Foodi OP300 Series Multi-Function Pressure Cooker
Recalled SharkNinja Foodi OP300 Series Multi-Function Pressure Cooker - Front of Packaging

Injuries.Name: SharkNinja has received 106 reports of burn injuries, including more than 50 reports of second- or third-degree burns to the face or body, with 26 lawsuits filed.

Retailers.Name: Available at Walmart, Costco, Sam's Club, Amazon, and Target stores nationwide, as well as online at www.Ninjakitchen.com, www.walmart.com, www.costco.com, www.samsclub.com, www.amazon.com, and www.target.com from January 2019 through March 2025 for approximately $200.

Importers.Name: SharkNinja Operating LLC, of Needham, Massachusetts

Hazards.Name: Risk of burn injuries due to the pressure-cooking lid opening during use

Remedies.Name: Stop using the pressure-cooking function and contact SharkNinja for a free replacement lid

recalls.metaDescription: SharkNinja recalls 1.8 million Foodi Multi-Function Pressure Cookers due to burn risk. Contact for a free replacement lid.
